39105792.title: Peta Hiku

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: New Zealand international rugby league footballer

39105792.description: New Zealand international rugby league footballer
39105792.extract:
Peta Hiku (born 4 December 1992) is a New Zealand rugby league footballer who plays as a centre, winger and fullback for Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League, and New Zealand and the New Zealand Māori at international level.
He previously played for the Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles, Penrith Panthers, New Zealand Warriors and North Queensland Cowboys in the NRL and the Warrington Wolves in the Super League.
